name: Airtable
description: A spreadsheet-database hybrid for tracking initiatives, strategic bets, owners, milestones, and decision criteria in a more structured way than flat docs.
whyUseIt: Airtable is strong when strategy needs structured tracking across many initiatives, dependencies, and review cadences without jumping straight to heavyweight project software.
aiCapabilities: Airtable AI helps classify records, summarise initiative updates, generate fields from notes, and turn operational data into cleaner strategic review inputs.
